data.content:
Implemented the scanned-agents Settings UI pass on feat/foolery-23f3.

What changed:
- removed the remaining optimistic selected-model state from the scan flow; selected pills/checkmarks now derive from successfully registered agent ids, so failed adds cannot leave false imported state in the row UI
- kept the requested streamlined scanned row presentation: no per-row Add or registered badge, full CLI path under the provider label, no Add All button, and success/success-light toolbar button variants
- retained the Codex provider rename and added unit coverage that openai/openai-path detection resolves to Codex
- expanded scanned-agents tests to cover registered-model pill rendering, absence of legacy controls, CLI path display, and toolbar button variants

Validation:
- bun run lint (passes with 1 pre-existing warning in src/components/beat-form.tsx about react-hooks/incompatible-library)
- bunx tsc --noEmit
- bun run test
- bun run build
